caption: A surfer on a light-colored surfboard rides down the face of a massive, curling blue wave under a cloudy, overcast sky. The surfer is wearing a dark wetsuit and is positioned near the center of the wave's face, maintaining balance as they glide forward. To the right of the surfer, a large section of the wave has already crashed, creating a turbulent wall of white seafoam and spray. As the sequence progresses, the surfer moves slightly further down the wave's slope, and the white foam to the right continues to surge and expand. The dark blue water of the wave's face contrasts sharply with the bright white foam and the pale, greyish-white clouds above. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
